titles.ar: باب حَدِّ الصَّبِيِّ الَّذِي يَجُوزُ لِلنِّسَاءِ أَنْ يُغَسِّلْنَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 30 – A limit of the male child which is allowed for the women that they can wash him

titles.ar: باب حَدِّ الصَّبِيِّ الَّذِي يَجُوزُ لِلنِّسَاءِ أَنْ يُغَسِّلْنَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 30 – A limit of the male child which is allowed for the women that they can wash him

segments: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) حَدِّثْنِي عَنِ الصَّبِيِّ إِلَى كَمْ تُغَسِّلُهُ النِّسَاءُ فَقَالَ إِلَى ثَلَاثِ سِنِينَ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) حَدِّثْنِي عَنِ الصَّبِيِّ إِلَى كَمْ تُغَسِّلُهُ النِّسَاءُ فَقَالَ إِلَى ثَلَاثِ سِنِينَ .

segments: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Ibn Al Numeyr, a slave of Al Haris Bin Al Mugheira who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Narrate to me about the male child, up to how much (age) can the women wash him?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Up to three years’.
en.hubeali.text:
Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Ibn Al Numeyr, a slave of Al Haris Bin Al Mugheira who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Narrate to me about the male child, up to how much (age) can the women wash him?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Up to three years’.

segments: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from ibn Faddal from Yunus ibn Ya’qub from ibn Numayr, Mawla’ al-Harith ibn al-Mughirah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, up to what age a child can be given Ghusl (bath) by women? He (the Imam) replied, ‘It is up to three years of age.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from ibn Faddal from Yunus ibn Ya’qub from ibn Numayr, Mawla’ al-Harith ibn al-Mughirah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, up to what age a child can be given Ghusl (bath) by women? He (the Imam) replied, ‘It is up to three years of age.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/340)
gradings.label: مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/340)

narratorChain.raw: أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ عَنِ ابْنِ النُّمَيْرِ مَوْلَى الْحَارِثِ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ قَالَ

parts.text: ابْنِ النُّمَيْرِ مَوْلَى الْحَارِثِ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ
